## Summary

- What changed?
- Why now?

## Verification

- [ ] `make ci`
- [ ] Manual smoke checks completed (if UI/API behavior changed)
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the changed behavior

## Documentation

- [ ] Updated README/docs for user-visible changes
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `[Unreleased]`

## Risk and rollout notes

- [ ] No secrets or private data introduced
- [ ] Backward compatibility impact described (or N/A)
- [ ] Migration/operational steps documented (or N/A)
